title: Software Update - DFU - Incoming mobile phone call during update
scenario: Firmware update (DFU) behavior when incoming mobile phone call is received and answered during the update process
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure your Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Initiate a firmware update (DFU) on the connected Poly device.
5. While the firmware update is in progress, have a second device call the mobile phone connected to the Poly device.
6. Answer the incoming call on the mobile phone (via the phone screen or the Poly device's Call button).
7. Monitor the firmware update progress on the Poly Studio Mobile app during and after the call.
8. End the call after a few seconds/minutes.
9. Observe whether the firmware update continues, completes successfully, or fails/errors out.
expected: The firmware update continues running or completes successfully without interruption. The Poly Studio Mobile app shows the update progressing normally during and after the call, and the device remains functional after the update completes.
